sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63329" key="li/mnitis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λίμν-ῑτις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, epith. of the moon, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Hymn.Mag.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.46</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
